scripts.sonic:rotor: bun run build && cd sonic && rotor build
scripts.sonic:roblox-ts: bun run build && cd sonic && bunx rbxtsc
scripts.slither:rotor: bun run build && cd slither && rotor build
scripts.slither:roblox-ts: bun run build && cd slither && bunx rbxtsc
scripts.bench:rotor: bun run build && cd bench && rotor build -p tsconfig.rotor.json --rojo rotor.project.json && rotor build -p tsconfig.notransform.rotor.json --rojo rotor.project.json
scripts.bench:roblox-ts: bun run build && cd bench && bunx rbxtsc -p tsconfig.roblox-ts.json --rojo roblox-ts.project.json && bunx rbxtsc -p tsconfig.notransform.roblox-ts.json --rojo roblox-ts.project.json
scripts.bench:rbxlx:rotor: bun run bench:rotor && cd bench && rojo build rotor.project.json -o benchmark-rotor.rbxlx
scripts.bench:rbxlx:roblox-ts: bun run bench:roblox-ts && cd bench && rojo build roblox-ts.project.json -o benchmark-roblox-ts.rbxlx
